name: create_comment
description: Add a comment to an existing ClickUp task. Comments support plain text and can include @mentions of team members using their user IDs. Notify assignees and watchers are optional. The comment appears in the task's activity stream.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: The ID of the task to add the comment to.

parameters.name: comment_text
parameters.description: The text content of the comment.
parameters.example: The mockup looks great! Just one change: can we make the CTA button more prominent?

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: User ID to assign the comment to (creates an assigned comment).

parameters.name: notify_all
parameters.description: If true, notify all task watchers about this comment.

body.comment_text: The mockup looks great! Just one change: can we make the CTA button more prominent?

comment.text: The mockup looks great! Just one change: can we make the CTA button more prominent?
